assertions.text: An audit record is written to docs/arrows/experiments/bidirectional-differential/pref/PREF-001.md
The audit record's Classification field is BIDIRECTIONAL-DRIFT
The audit record's B-direction section elevates the empty-string fallback and the skip-on-empty behavior as unstated requirements
The audit record's A-direction section shows at least two distinct tiebreaker choices across the N runs (different behavior when both primary and secondary are missing)
The Drift findings list tags at least one finding with one of the three severities (possible-bug, latent-refactor-hazard, or pure-documentation)
The Default Action is 'triage-required' or includes both reconcile-code and reconcile-EARS options given the severity ambiguity
